definitions.usage_example: He is receiving treatment for cancer.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He is receiving treatment for cancer.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Atención médica dada a un paciente por una enfermedad o lesión.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Medical care given to a patient for an illness or injury.

definitions.usage_example: His treatment of his employees is bad.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: His treatment of his employees is bad.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: La forma en que uno se comporta o trata a alguien o algo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: The way one behaves toward or deals with someone or something.
